criteria_results.text: .als opens in Ableton Live 12 without error
criteria_results.notes: After 3 iterations: (1) guessed MinorVersion 12.0.12049 rejected, (2) empty Value= attributes rejected, (3) swapped to user's native Live 12 template — success. Intermediate failures were C3 in-process corrections.

criteria_results.text: ChordPro chords preserved inline in lyric text
criteria_results.notes: User confirmed chords appear in preview and stamp clip names.

criteria_results.text: Stamp preview clearly communicates next-to-stamp line
criteria_results.notes: User confirmed label and arrow key navigation working.

process_issues.description: Scope expanded: added Playwright E2E suite, static file serving, and arrow key navigation beyond original issue scope.
process_issues.detected_by: Git diff shows 12 files changed across .als template, routes.ts static serving, Playwright config + specs, app.tsx arrow keys, hintbar update.

issues.description: acceptance-contract was skipped for all three issues — no contract.json generated. Issues had acceptance criteria in body but were dispatched directly to coding-agent.
issues.detected_by: Transcript inspection: no Skill invocation for acceptance-contract; no docs/ai/contracts/issue-N.json files created.

issues.description: project-state-updater was edited in-process rather than dispatched as a skill. The SKILL.md was not invoked via Skill tool.
issues.detected_by: Transcript shows Edit on docs/ai/project-state.md directly, no Skill invocation for project-state-updater.

issues.description: Coding-agent created branch `fix/als-minorversion-live12` instead of stacking onto `issue-1-electron-wrapper`. Required manual stash+checkout+merge.
issues.detected_by: Branch mismatch detected after coding-agent dispatch; git branch showed wrong branch.

failure_output: Issue #26 smoke round 1: 'Unsupported MinorVersion (12.0.12049)' — guessed version format wrong (needed underscore: 12.0_12402). Round 2: 'not well-formed (invalid token) at line 101' — regex \bValue> matched tag name <Value>. Round 3: 'not well-formed (invalid token) at line 248' — same regex matched <Value> tag name with different indentation. Final fix: swapped to user's native Live 12 .als as template, removed all XML patching.
suggested_follow_up: For .als template version compatibility, always source template from user's exact Live version rather than guessing/patching version strings.
